arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 2-0 win vs Getafe
arts.sum: They breezed past them, aided by goals from Kylian Mbappe and Jude Bellingham, and as everyone has seen time and time again, Real Madrid look good again. Real Madrid ’s win over Getafe was solid – really good, actually – and it was something that the team and its players needed.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid exploring move for Dalot
arts.sum: Manchester City, Chelsea, and Tottenham Hotspur are all believed to be keen on the 26-year-old after he recently impressed in the UEFA Champions League against Real Madrid. Real Madrid could turn their attention to Diogo Dalot while Manchester United are looking at moves for both Viktor Gyökeres and Kenan Yıldız .

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao vs. Real Madrid: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's La Liga clash between Athletic Bilbao and Real Madrid, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: West Ham line up Julen Lopetegui replacement as ex-Real Madrid boss feels the heat
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui is struggling at West Ham with the Hammers sat in the bottom half and the hierarchy at the London Stadium are having to consider managerial alternatives

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make contact with Dalot - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid make contact with Manchester United's Diogo Dalot, Mohamed Salah is willing to accept a one-year deal at Liverpool, while Wayne Rooney is under pressure at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao lineup vs. Real Madrid: Will Julen Agirrezabala or Unai Simon start in goal?
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Athletic Bilbao could line up for Wednesday's La Liga clash with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior and Eduardo Camavinga dress to impress for Getafe at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior and Eduardo Camavinga impressed on the touchline at the Santiago Bernabeu on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid youngster to be rewarded for form with new contract
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are ready to offer a new contract to young defender Raúl Asencio. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who has on Monday provided an…
